response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist software engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, and recent exposure to MCP and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and the candidate's demonstrable GenAI experience spans roughly one year. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, AI evaluation pipelines, Python, or designing AI systems on major cloud platforms — the core competencies of this Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role.
strengths: 15+ years of broad, production-grade software engineering experience across stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++)
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong communication and mentoring track record (workshops, conference talks, courses) fitting customer-facing work
concerns: Falls far short of the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development required — roughly 1 year of AI-adjacent work
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No Python listed and limited evidence of cloud-native AI system design (only AWS CDK for pricing infrastructure)

key_factors.factor: Missing core stack (RAG, vector DBs, Python, eval pipelines)
Strong senior engineering fundamentals and teaching/mentoring ability
